name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve

---

**Contribution Guidelines**

Before filing an issue, please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/lestrrat-go/helium/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md).

**Describe the bug**

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

Please attach the output of `go version`.

**To Reproduce / Expected behavior**

Please attach a standalone Go test/code snippet that shows the problem and what you expected to happen.

If this is an API change request and a fully working snippet is hard to provide,
please do your best to provide near-valid code that communicates the behavior.

**Additional context**

Add any other context, logs, or screenshots here. Please delete this section if unnecessary.
